heading: This Afternoon
text: Mostly cloudy, with the chance for a few lingering showers. Temperatures falling into the 30s, with some locations in the north seeing 20s. Wind turning west at 10 to 15 mph, gusting 25 to 30 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Gradual clearing west to east, clouds lingering through the northern mountains. Much colder. Lows in the teens to near 20 north, low to mid 20s south. Northwest wind near 10 mph, diminishing to light.

heading: Friday
text: Some morning sun, then an increasing chance of rain/snow showers from the west midday. Highs in the mid to upper 30s. Light wind, becoming south near 10 mph, with gusts increasing 20 to 25 mph west of the Green Mountains.
